# UC-23.2.8 · Pipeline Coverage Ratio (3x/4x Rule), Quota Attainment Forecasting, and Sales-Rep-Tier Performance Distribution

> **Criticality:** Critical &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Platform &middot; **Type:** Business &middot; **Wave:** Walk &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We weigh still-open deals scheduled this quarter against each seller's official quota so thin cushion shows before forecasts bite. We map who carries most booked dollars versus who stalls one stage for months so coaches rebalance territories fairly.*

---

## Description

Measures **pipeline coverage ratio** as **sum(open Opportunity.Amount scheduled inside the active fiscal quarter)** divided by **published quarterly quota** (**Quota.QuotaAmount** or SPM-fed **`quota_amt`**), segmented by **`ForecastCategoryName`**, **`Territory2`** slice, and configurable **`rep_tier`**, rather than benchmarking open pipe exclusively against trailing closed-won dollars. Computes **weighted coverage** (**Probability × Amount** numerator), **quota-attainment forecast** using explicit category tiers (**Commit**, **Best Case**, **Pipeline**) plus an **`hist_stage_blend_pct`** lookup standing in for InsightSquared-style stage conversion curves, surfaces **deal-stuck** pressure (**LastModifiedDate** dwell **>90 days** while **`StageName`** stays non-terminal), and emits **cumulative_book_pct** slices so HiPo (**high attainment concentration**) versus coaching tails align with Pavilion / HubSpot style **Pareto** narratives instead of velocity-only narratives.

## Value

Chief Revenue Officers and **Sales Operations** steer quarterly commits using **coverage_band** thresholds (**InsightSquared** median **~3.4×**, top quartile **~5.2×**) while comparing Splunk-calibrated **`attainment_fcst_pct`** to board-facing Einstein / **Clari** / **Aviso** calls — shrinking the **Gartner ±15% median** forecast miss by catching **ForecastCategoryName** drift early. Pairing **`stuck_opps`** with **Gong deal risk** or **Outreach sequence** states keeps field programs focused on **territory balance** before **quota** heat maps show lopsided **OwnerId** workload, preserving headcount planning and attainment equity conversations **without** collapsing the story into pure stage-velocity trending owned by UC-23.2.1.

## Implementation

Land Bulk API 2.0 Opportunity CSV on HEC sourcetype salesforce:opportunity with CloseDate, ForecastCategoryName, Probability, LastModifiedDate; hydrate rep_quota_forecast.csv nightly from Quota (/services/data/v62.0/sobjects/Quota) plus Territory2 and UserTerritory2Association extracts so quota_amt matches Salesforce UI totals; paste SPL into Dashboard Studio with fiscal-quarter tokens; route alerts when coverage_band equals below_two_x to RevOps and FP&A inside five working days of quarter exit.

## Detailed Implementation

### Prerequisites
- Heavy Forwarder or ingest tier permitted outbound **`POST https://login.salesforce.com/services/oauth2/token`** JWT bearer exchanges plus **`POST /services/data/v62.0/jobs/query`** Bulk API traffic toward **`Opportunity`**, **`Quota`**, **`Territory2`**, **`UserTerritory2Association`**, **`ForecastingItem`** exports.
- **`Splunk HTTP Event Collector`** endpoint accepting **`salesforce:opportunity`** JSON lines at **`batch`** cadence — tune **`indexes=business`** under **`inputs.conf`** `[http]` stanzas.
- **`Splunk DB Connect`** ([Splunkbase 2686](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2686)) JDBC identities (`splunk_app_db_connect`) when warehouses replicate **`crm.opportunity_fact`** tables faster than Bulk completes compliance review.
- **`lookup`** artifacts **`rep_quota_forecast.csv`** (`OwnerId`,`quota_amt`,`fiscal_segment`,`rep_tier`,`territory_label`,`hist_stage_blend_pct`) refreshed nightly via **`outputlookup`** automation sourcing **`Quota`** (**`QuotaAmount`**, **`StartDate`**) merged with HR **`HiPo`** tiers.
- Roles granting **`srchIndexesAllowed=business`** plus lookup read ACLs — deny **`quota_amt`** edit rights for analysts.

**Step 1 — Configure data collection**
Bulk API path: Issue **`Connected App`** JWT certs per Salesforce Help; poll **`jobs/query`** with SOQL akin to **`SELECT Id, StageName, Amount, Probability, ForecastCategoryName, OwnerId, AccountId, CloseDate, LastModifiedDate, LastActivityDate, HasOpenActivity, HasOverdueTask FROM Opportunity WHERE LastModifiedDate > last_run_watermark`** — persist **`high_water`** checkpoint files alongside **`splunkd`** app workspace.
Map CSV columns directly into **`salesforce:opportunity`** — **`FIELDALIAS`** optional when CSV headers arrive lowercase.
Schedule **`salesforce:quota`** modular inputs hitting **`GET /services/data/v62.0/query?q=SELECT+OwnerId,QuotaAmount,StartDate,CurrencyIsoCode,Type+FROM+Quota`** — normalize **`quota_amt`** into **`rep_quota_forecast.csv`** keyed by **`OwnerId`** + **`fiscal_segment`**.
Territory overlays: replicate **`Territory2`** (**`/services/data/v62.0/sobjects/Territory2`**) plus **`UserTerritory2Association`** so **`lookup`** enrichment resolves **`territory_label`** matching **`Enterprise`** pods versus **`SMB`** hunter lanes.
Adjunct feeds: configure scripted **`curl`** collectors posting **`clari:forecast_event`** payloads referencing **`GET https://api.clari.com/v4/forecasts`** responses — attach **`Authorization: Bearer`** secrets via **`storage/passwords`** REST.
Mirror **`gong:deal_risk_event`** using Gong [developers.gong.io](https://developers.gong.io/) endpoints where feasible — optional **`join`** **`DealId`** → **`Opportunity.Id`** for coaching overlays.
Secondary SPM: poll **`POST https://api.anaplan.com/2/{workspace}/modules/{module}/imports`** bulk pushes (`anaplan:spm_event`) when **`quota_amt`** truth stems from Anaplan SPM rather than native **`Quota`** rows.
Document **`hist_stage_blend_pct`** sourcing (InsightSquared stage funnel benchmarks vs internally computed **`stage_conversion.csv`**).

**Step 2 — Create the search and alert**
Paste the authoritative SPL identical to the JSON **`spl`** field into Search — **`Save As`** **`coverage_quota_fcst_primary`**.
```spl
index=business (sourcetype="salesforce:opportunity" OR sourcetype="dbx:crm_opportunities") earliest=-120d@d
| eval Id=coalesce(Id, id, opportunity_id)
| eval StageName=coalesce(StageName, stage_name)
| eval Amount=tonumber(coalesce(Amount, amount, "0"))
| eval Probability=tonumber(coalesce(Probability, probability, "0"))
| eval ForecastCategoryName=coalesce(ForecastCategoryName, forecast_category, "Unspecified")
| eval OwnerId=coalesce(OwnerId, owner_id)
| eval CloseDateStr=coalesce(CloseDate, close_date)
| eval CloseD=if(isnotnull(CloseDateStr) AND match(CloseDateStr,"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}"), strptime(substr(CloseDateStr,1,10),"%Y-%m-%d"), null())
| eval LastModStr=coalesce(LastModifiedDate, last_modified_date)
| eval LastModEpoch=strptime(replace(substr(LastModStr,1,19),"T"," "),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
| eval IsClosed_f=if(like(StageName,"%Closed Won%") OR like(StageName,"%Closed Lost%") OR in(lower(tostring(coalesce(IsClosed,is_closed,""))),"1","true"),1,0)
| eval IsWon_f=if(like(StageName,"%Closed Won%") OR in(lower(tostring(coalesce(IsWon,is_won,""))),"1","true"),1,0)
| eval open_opp=if(IsClosed_f=0,1,0)
| eval fq0=relative_time(now(),"@q")
| eval fq1=relative_time(now(),"+3mon@q")
| eval in_fq=if(isnotnull(CloseD) AND CloseD>=fq0 AND CloseD<fq1,1,0)
| eval cq_pipe=if(open_opp=1 AND in_fq=1, Amount, 0)
| eval cq_wgt=if(open_opp=1 AND in_fq=1, Amount*Probability/100, 0)
| eval fc=lower(ForecastCategoryName)
| eval commit_amt=if(open_opp=1 AND in_fq=1 AND (match(fc,"commit") OR match(fc,"closed")), Amount, 0)
| eval best_amt=if(open_opp=1 AND in_fq=1 AND match(fc,"best"), Amount, 0)
| eval pipe_amt=if(open_opp=1 AND in_fq=1 AND (match(fc,"pipeline") OR match(fc,"omit")), Amount, 0)
| eval stuck_flag=if(open_opp=1 AND isnotnull(LastModEpoch) AND ((now()-LastModEpoch)/86400)>90,1,0)
| eval won_cq=if(IsWon_f=1 AND IsClosed_f=1 AND in_fq=1, Amount, 0)
| stats sum(cq_pipe) as open_pipeline_fq sum(cq_wgt) as wp_f sum(commit_amt) as commit_open sum(best_amt) as best_open sum(pipe_amt) as pipe_open sum(stuck_flag) as stuck_opps sum(won_cq) as closed_won_cq by OwnerId
| lookup rep_quota_forecast.csv OwnerId OUTPUTNEW quota_amt fiscal_segment rep_tier territory_label hist_stage_blend_pct
| eval hb=coalesce(hist_stage_blend_pct,0.28)
| eval coverage_ratio=if(quota_amt>0, round(open_pipeline_fq/quota_amt, 3), null())
| eval weighted_cov=if(quota_amt>0, round(wp_f/quota_amt, 3), null())
| eval attainment_fcst_pct=if(quota_amt>0, round(100*(closed_won_cq + commit_open + 0.5*best_open + hb*pipe_open)/quota_amt, 1), null())
| eval coverage_band=case(isnull(coverage_ratio),"unknown",coverage_ratio>=5,"five_x",coverage_ratio>=4,"four_x",coverage_ratio>=3,"three_x",coverage_ratio>=2,"two_x",1=1,"below_two_x")
| eventstats sum(closed_won_cq) as org_booked_sum
| eval rep_book_pct=if(org_booked_sum>0 AND quota_amt>0, round(100*closed_won_cq/org_booked_sum, 2), null())
| sort fiscal_segment rep_tier - closed_won_cq
| streamstats global=f window=100000 sum(rep_book_pct) as cumulative_book_pct by fiscal_segment
| eval tier_stride=case(rep_book_pct>=12 AND cumulative_book_pct<=78,"HiPo_band",coverage_band="below_two_x" AND attainment_fcst_pct<90,"PIP_watch","median_core")
| table OwnerId territory_label rep_tier quota_amt open_pipeline_fq wp_f weighted_cov coverage_ratio coverage_band attainment_fcst_pct stuck_opps rep_book_pct cumulative_book_pct tier_stride
| sort - coverage_ratio
```
Understanding cues: **`coverage_ratio`** divides **`open_pipeline_fq`** (sum raw `Amount` scheduled inside `fq_start`/`fq_end`) by `quota_amt` — distinct from UC-23.2.1 velocity framing — aligning **InsightSquared median 3.4×** posture versus `weighted_cov` (probability-weighted numerator) mirroring Salesforce `ForecastCategoryName` cautious reads.
`attainment_fcst_pct` folds `closed_won_cq`, `commit_open`, discounted `best_open`, and `hist_blend` × `pipe_open` — referencing **Salesforce State of Sales** uplift tied to 4× coverage cohorts versus thin mixes.
`tier_stride` hints HiPo concentration (**HubSpot Pareto** anchor top 20% revenue mass) versus `PIP_watch` pairing `below_two_x` coverage with `attainment_fcst_pct` pressure.
Wire `alert` predicates when `coverage_band`=`below_two_x` `AND` `days_to_q_end` macro ≤ `7` — throttle `OwnerId` duplicates hourly.

**Step 3 — Validate**
- Compare `coverage_ratio` aggregates vs **CRM Analytics** / **Tableau CRM** workbook slices filtered `Close Date` = active quarter.
- Pull `ForecastingItem` totals inside **Salesforce Forecast** tabs — reconcile `ForecastCategoryName` splits vs `commit_open`/`best_open`/`pipe_open` sums.
- Spot-check `quota_amt` against `Quota` UI (Setup → Quotas) ensuring `CurrencyIsoCode` alignment.
- Validate `stuck_flag` picks against `OpportunityHistory` `StageName` dwell (`/services/data/v62.0/sobjects/OpportunityHistory`).
- Compare `rep_book_pct` distribution vs finance `booking` extracts — variance hints `Split` overlays.
- Confirm `hist_blend` coefficients vs curated `stage_conversion.csv` exported from `salesforce:opportunity_history` quarterly averages.

**Step 4 — Operationalize**
Publish **Dashboard Studio** workbook layering `splunk.singlevalue` `coverage_ratio` next to `weighted_cov` gauges — annotate headline KPI cards citing **InsightSquared benchmark quartiles** (bottom quartile ~1.9×) purely narrative.
Embed `splunk.table` `OwnerId` drilldown launching Salesforce Lightning record URLs.
Route `PIP_watch` `tier_stride` rows through **People.ai activity density** overlays when `peopleai:activity_event` ingest exists.
Schedule `monitoring_quality` saved searches verifying `missing_quota` `lookup` joins bounce `UNKNOWN_OWNER` Slack routes.
Attach **Microsoft Teams** adaptive cards referencing `coverage_band` emoji thresholds (🔴 below_two_x, 🟢 four_x_guardrail).
Archive weekly CSV snapshots via **`outputcsv`** into restricted **`audit_evidence`** index for board readiness consistent with **Forrester forecast-accuracy priority** narratives (78% leaders cite accuracy top-three priority).

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting**
- `mvfind` misses `IsClosed` boolean synonyms — broaden `eval` `match` lists when `postgres` warehouses emit `t`/`f` letters.
- `stats` `dc(eval(...))` returns zero — `fill_null` `Id` upstream or `replace` blanks.
- `lookup` `quota_amt` zero inflates `coverage_ratio` infinite — `where` `quota_amt` `>` `0` before dividing.
- `relative_time` `@q` differs from fiscal `PERIV` calendars — swap macros referencing `fiscal_calendar.csv`.
- `ForecastCategoryName` `picklist` translations (Japanese kanji) fail `match` — `eval` `regex` tolerant `letters-or-spaces` buckets.
- `streamstats` `cumulative_book_pct` resets unpredictably — enforce `sort` order `fiscal_segment` → `closed_won_cq` descending prior `streamstats`.
- `Bulk` `QUERY_TIMEOUT` responses — shrink `LastModifiedDate` slices.
- `FIELDALIAS` duplication duplicates `Amount` — flatten ingestion transforms.
- `Partner` `Account` `sharing` hides `Amount` — `403` gaps reveal `role` omissions.
- `Sandbox` `OwnerId` mismatches `Production` `quota` CSV — `UNKNOWN` `tier_stride` blooms.
- `Einstein` `forecast` nightly jobs spike `Probability` leading `weighted_cov` jitter — freeze nightly `Probability` snapshots outside `forecast` windows.
- `Salesloft` `cadence` overlays triple `events` `OwnerId` joins — `dedup` `Id` prior `stats`.
- `HubSpot`/`Dynamics` blended migrations duplicate `crm` rows — sourcetype `union` `dedup` `SystemModstamp`.
- `Manual` `quota` `spreadsheet` uploads mismatch `CSV` timestamps — reconcile `mtime` `lookup` archives.
- `Territory` `realignments` orphan `lookup` `territory_label` until `generate` rerun — `unknown_region` spikes.
- `InsightSquared` CSV import uses comma decimals — `replace` commas prior `tonumber`.
- `JWT` `invalid_grant` errors — rotate `Connected App` assertion clocks skew `exp` claims beyond `Salesforce` tolerance.

## SPL

```spl
index=business (sourcetype="salesforce:opportunity" OR sourcetype="dbx:crm_opportunities") earliest=-120d@d
| eval Id=coalesce(Id, id, opportunity_id)
| eval StageName=coalesce(StageName, stage_name)
| eval Amount=tonumber(coalesce(Amount, amount, "0"))
| eval Probability=tonumber(coalesce(Probability, probability, "0"))
| eval ForecastCategoryName=coalesce(ForecastCategoryName, forecast_category, "Unspecified")
| eval OwnerId=coalesce(OwnerId, owner_id)
| eval CloseDateStr=coalesce(CloseDate, close_date)
| eval CloseD=if(isnotnull(CloseDateStr) AND match(CloseDateStr,"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}"), strptime(substr(CloseDateStr,1,10),"%Y-%m-%d"), null())
| eval LastModStr=coalesce(LastModifiedDate, last_modified_date)
| eval LastModEpoch=strptime(replace(substr(LastModStr,1,19),"T"," "),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
| eval IsClosed_f=if(like(StageName,"%Closed Won%") OR like(StageName,"%Closed Lost%") OR in(lower(tostring(coalesce(IsClosed,is_closed,""))),"1","true"),1,0)
| eval IsWon_f=if(like(StageName,"%Closed Won%") OR in(lower(tostring(coalesce(IsWon,is_won,""))),"1","true"),1,0)
| eval open_opp=if(IsClosed_f=0,1,0)
| eval fq0=relative_time(now(),"@q")
| eval fq1=relative_time(now(),"+3mon@q")
| eval in_fq=if(isnotnull(CloseD) AND CloseD>=fq0 AND CloseD<fq1,1,0)
| eval cq_pipe=if(open_opp=1 AND in_fq=1, Amount, 0)
| eval cq_wgt=if(open_opp=1 AND in_fq=1, Amount*Probability/100, 0)
| eval fc=lower(ForecastCategoryName)
| eval commit_amt=if(open_opp=1 AND in_fq=1 AND (match(fc,"commit") OR match(fc,"closed")), Amount, 0)
| eval best_amt=if(open_opp=1 AND in_fq=1 AND match(fc,"best"), Amount, 0)
| eval pipe_amt=if(open_opp=1 AND in_fq=1 AND (match(fc,"pipeline") OR match(fc,"omit")), Amount, 0)
| eval stuck_flag=if(open_opp=1 AND isnotnull(LastModEpoch) AND ((now()-LastModEpoch)/86400)>90,1,0)
| eval won_cq=if(IsWon_f=1 AND IsClosed_f=1 AND in_fq=1, Amount, 0)
| stats sum(cq_pipe) as open_pipeline_fq sum(cq_wgt) as wp_f sum(commit_amt) as commit_open sum(best_amt) as best_open sum(pipe_amt) as pipe_open sum(stuck_flag) as stuck_opps sum(won_cq) as closed_won_cq by OwnerId
| lookup rep_quota_forecast.csv OwnerId OUTPUTNEW quota_amt fiscal_segment rep_tier territory_label hist_stage_blend_pct
| eval hb=coalesce(hist_stage_blend_pct,0.28)
| eval coverage_ratio=if(quota_amt>0, round(open_pipeline_fq/quota_amt, 3), null())
| eval weighted_cov=if(quota_amt>0, round(wp_f/quota_amt, 3), null())
| eval attainment_fcst_pct=if(quota_amt>0, round(100*(closed_won_cq + commit_open + 0.5*best_open + hb*pipe_open)/quota_amt, 1), null())
| eval coverage_band=case(isnull(coverage_ratio),"unknown",coverage_ratio>=5,"five_x",coverage_ratio>=4,"four_x",coverage_ratio>=3,"three_x",coverage_ratio>=2,"two_x",1=1,"below_two_x")
| eventstats sum(closed_won_cq) as org_booked_sum
| eval rep_book_pct=if(org_booked_sum>0 AND quota_amt>0, round(100*closed_won_cq/org_booked_sum, 2), null())
| sort fiscal_segment rep_tier - closed_won_cq
| streamstats global=f window=100000 sum(rep_book_pct) as cumulative_book_pct by fiscal_segment
| eval tier_stride=case(rep_book_pct>=12 AND cumulative_book_pct<=78,"HiPo_band",coverage_band="below_two_x" AND attainment_fcst_pct<90,"PIP_watch","median_core")
| table OwnerId territory_label rep_tier quota_amt open_pipeline_fq wp_f weighted_cov coverage_ratio coverage_band attainment_fcst_pct stuck_opps rep_book_pct cumulative_book_pct tier_stride
| sort - coverage_ratio
```

## Visualization

**Dashboard Studio**: (`1`) trellis **`splunk.singlevalue`** tiles for **`coverage_ratio`** versus **`weighted_cov`** per **`territory_label`** with InsightSquared-inspired bands (**`<2×`**, **`3×`**, **`4×`**); (`2`) stacked bars for **`ForecastCategoryName`** mix atop **`open_pipeline_fq`**; (`3`) **`splunk.line`** overlay **`attainment_fcst_pct`** vs quota pacing curve by **`OwnerId`**; (`4`) pareto **`splunk.column`** on **`rep_book_pct`** with **`cumulative_book_pct`** reference lines near **80%** revenue concentration; (`5`) alert table keyed by **`stuck_opps`** **>** **0** plus Gong/Aviso hyperlink drill-through tokens.

## Known False Positives

**Multi-segment quota books** assign one seller both **renewal** and **new-logo** targets yet Splunk collapses them into a single **`quota_amt`**, overstating **`coverage_ratio`** when **`Type`** filters exclude **renewal** pipe from the numerator only. **Partner-sourced overlays** credit **same `AccountId`** opps to **channel managers** whose **Quota** rows still show **enterprise** bottoms-up numbers, so **`coverage_band`** flashes **two_x** though the **account** is genuinely well covered through **distribution**. **ForecastCategoryName overrides** lag **Collaborative Forecasting** **ForecastingItem** rows during weekly **forecast review** locks; Splunk reads **Opportunity** picklist text while managers commit in the **forecast grid**, inflating **`attainment_fcst_pct`** until nightly **Einstein** sync completes. **CurrencyIsoCode** mismatches (**USD quota** vs **EUR opps**) compress **`coverage_ratio`** after **FX** tables slip a day versus treasury marks. **Territory2 mass moves** orphan **`Territory2Id`** joins mid-quarter — **`lookup`** tables referencing stale **`territory_label`** buckets mis-attribute **`tier_stride`** coaching cues until **`salesforce:territory_assignment`** catches up. **Split-opportunity overlays** (**overlay AE + core AE**) duplicate **`Amount`** rows across **`OwnerId`** copies unless ingest collapses via **`SplitPercentage`**, distorting **`rep_book_pct`** Pareto tails. **Historical blend coefficients** (**`hist_stage_blend_pct`**) anchored to **InsightSquared** benchmarks drift when **Salesforce OpportunityStage** probability knobs reset during **Sales Path** edits — **`hist_blend`** stays stale and **`coverage_band`** reads artificially optimistic until CSV refresh. **Quarter-start sandbox refreshes** replay **`CloseDate`** edits so **`open_pipeline_fq`** briefly doubles until **`dedup`** checkpoints reset.
